cleavage agent: Trypsin (Sigma T8003) in 40 mM Tris–HCl pH 7.5 buffer was added
instrument: analyzed by online nanoliquid chromatography coupled to tandem MS (UltiMate 3000 RSLCnano and Q-Exactive Plus, Thermo Scientific)
labeling: Intensity-based absolute quantification (iBAQ) values were calculated from MS intensities of identified peptides.
reduction reagent: Dithiothreitol (DTT) was then added at a final concentration of 10 mM
reduction concentration: Dithiothreitol (DTT) was then added at a final concentration of 10 mM
